channel.title: Debian GNU/Linux — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Debian GNU/Linux (debian).

item.title: CVE-2026-2219 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: It was discovered that dpkg-deb (a component of dpkg, the Debian package management system) does not properly validate the end of the data stream when uncompressing a zstd-compressed .deb archive, which may result in denial of service (infinite loop…

item.title: CVE-2025-8454 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: It was discovered that uscan, a tool to scan/watch upstream sources for new releases of software, included in devscripts (a collection of scripts to make the life of a Debian Package maintainer easier), skips OpenPGP verification if the upstream sour…

item.title: CVE-2025-6297 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — dpkg-deb: Fix cleanup for control member with restricted directories
item.description: It was discovered that dpkg-deb does not properly sanitize directory permissions when extracting a control member into a temporary directory, which is documented as being a safe operation even on untrusted data. This may result in leaving temporary f…

item.title: CVE-2015-0849 · 3.9 LOW
item.description: pycode-browser before version 1.0 is prone to a predictable temporary file vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2015-0843 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: yubiserver before 0.6 is prone to buffer overflows due to misuse of sprintf.

item.title: CVE-2015-0842 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: yubiserver before 0.6 is prone to SQL injection issues, potentially leading to an authentication bypass.

item.title: CVE-2014-6274 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — S3 and Glacier remotes creds embedded in the git repo were not encrypted
item.description: git-annex had a bug in the S3 and Glacier remotes where if embedcreds=yes was set, and the remote used encryption=pubkey or encryption=hybrid, the embedded AWS credentials were stored in the git repository in (effectively) plaintext, not encrypted as…

item.title: CVE-2014-7210 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: pdns specific as packaged in Debian in version before 3.3.1-1 creates a too privileged MySQL user. It was discovered that the maintainer scripts of pdns-backend-mysql grant too wide database permissions for the pdns user. Other backends are not affec…

item.title: CVE-2014-0468 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Vulnerability in fusionforge in the shipped Apache configuration, where the web server may execute scripts that the users would have uploaded in their raw SCM repositories (SVN, Git, Bzr...). This issue affects fusionforge: before 5.3+20140506.

item.title: CVE-2013-1424 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Buffer overflow vulnerability in matplotlib.This issue affects matplotlib: before upstream commit ba4016014cb4fb4927e36ce8ea429fed47dcb787.

item.title: CVE-2022-2787 — stricter rules on chroot names
item.description: Schroot before 1.6.13 had too permissive rules on chroot or session names, allowing a denial of service on the schroot service for all users that may start a schroot session.

item.title: CVE-2022-1664 — directory traversal for in-place extracts with untrusted v2 and v3 source packages with debian.tar
item.description: Dpkg::Source::Archive in dpkg, the Debian package management system, before version 1.21.8, 1.20.10, 1.19.8, 1.18.26 is prone to a directory traversal vulnerability. When extracting untrusted source packages in v2 and v3 source package formats that i…

item.title: CVE-2016-1239
item.description: duck before 0.10 did not properly handle loading of untrusted code from the current directory.

item.title: CVE-2022-0543 · 10 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️
item.description: It was discovered, that redis, a persistent key-value database, due to a packaging issue, is prone to a (Debian-specific) Lua sandbox escape, which could result in remote code execution.

item.title: CVE-2021-20001
item.description: It was discovered, that debian-edu-config, a set of configuration files used for the Debian Edu blend, before 2.12.16 configured insecure permissions for the user web shares (~/public_html), which could result in privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2015-1877
item.description: The open_generic_xdg_mime function in xdg-open in xdg-utils 1.1.0 rc1 in Debian, when using dash, does not properly handle local variables, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2020-3811
item.description: qmail-verify as used in netqmail 1.06 is prone to a mail-address verification bypass vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2020-3812
item.description: qmail-verify as used in netqmail 1.06 is prone to an information disclosure vulnerability. A local attacker can test for the existence of files and directories anywhere in the filesystem because qmail-verify runs as root and tests for the existence o…

item.title: CVE-2020-3810
item.description: Missing input validation in the ar/tar implementations of APT before version 2.1.2 could result in denial of service when processing specially crafted deb files.

item.title: CVE-2016-7524
item.description: coders/meta.c in ImageMagick allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read) via a crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2016-7523
item.description: coders/meta.c in ImageMagick allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read) via a crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2016-9928
item.description: MCabber before 1.0.4 is vulnerable to roster push attacks, which allows remote attackers to intercept communications, or add themselves as an entity on a 3rd party's roster as another user, which will also garner associated privileges, via crafted XM…

item.title: CVE-2013-1437
item.description: Eval injection vulnerability in the Module-Metadata module before 1.000015 for Perl allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary Perl code via the $Version value.

item.title: CVE-2014-9481
item.description: The Scribunto extension for MediaWiki allows remote attackers to obtain the rollback token and possibly other sensitive information via a crafted module, related to unstripping special page HTML.

item.title: CVE-2015-2688
item.description: buf_pullup in Tor before 0.2.4.26 and 0.2.5.x before 0.2.5.11 does not properly handle unexpected arrival times of buffers with invalid layouts, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon exit) via crafte…

item.title: CVE-2015-2689
item.description: Tor before 0.2.4.26 and 0.2.5.x before 0.2.5.11 does not properly handle pending-connection resolve states during periods of high DNS load, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon exit) via crafted pac…

item.title: CVE-2015-2929
item.description: The Hidden Service (HS) client implementation in Tor before 0.2.4.27, 0.2.5.x before 0.2.5.12, and 0.2.6.x before 0.2.6.7 allows remote servers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and application exit) via a malformed HS descriptor.

item.title: CVE-2015-2928
item.description: The Hidden Service (HS) server implementation in Tor before 0.2.4.27, 0.2.5.x before 0.2.5.12, and 0.2.6.x before 0.2.6.7 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and daemon exit) via unspecified vectors.

item.title: CVE-2014-6275
item.description: FusionForge before 5.3.2 use scripts that run under the shared Apache user, which is also used by project homepages by default. If project webpages are hosted on the same server than FusionForge, it can allow users to incorrectly access on-disk priva…

item.title: CVE-2013-7351
item.description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in index.php in Shaarli allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the URL to the (1) showRSS, (2) showATOM, or (3) showDailyRSS function; a (4) file name to the importFile fu…

item.title: CVE-2019-3467
item.description: Debian-edu-config all versions < 2.11.10, a set of configuration files used for Debian Edu, and debian-lan-config < 0.26, configured too permissive ACLs for the Kerberos admin server, which allowed password changes for other Kerberos user principals.

item.title: CVE-2014-1867
item.description: suPHP before 0.7.2 source-highlighting feature allows security bypass which could lead to arbitrary code execution

item.title: CVE-2015-0841
item.description: Off-by-one error in the readBuf function in listener.cpp in libcapsinetwork and monopd before 0.9.8, allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a long line.

item.title: CVE-2015-0837
item.description: The mpi_powm function in Libgcrypt before 1.6.3 and GnuPG before 1.4.19 allows attackers to obtain sensitive information by leveraging timing differences when accessing a pre-computed table during modular exponentiation, related to a "Last-Level Cach…

item.title: CVE-2012-2248
item.description: An issue was discovered in dhclient 4.3.1-6 due to an embedded path variable.

item.title: CVE-2015-1396
item.description: A Directory Traversal vulnerability exists in the GNU patch before 2.7.4. A remote attacker can write to arbitrary files via a symlink attack in a patch file. NOTE: this issue exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2015-1196.

item.title: CVE-2014-5255
item.description: xcfa before 5.0.1 creates temporary files insecurely which could allow local users to launch a symlink attack and overwrite arbitrary files. Note: A different vulnerability than CVE-2014-5254.

item.title: CVE-2014-5254
item.description: xcfa before 5.0.1 creates temporary files insecurely which could allow local users to launch a symlink attack and overwrite arbitrary files.

item.title: CVE-2015-2793
item.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in templates/openid-selector.tmpl in ikiwiki before 3.20150329 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the openid_identifier parameter in a verify action to ikiwiki.cgi.

item.title: CVE-2012-2238
item.description: trytond 2.4: ModelView.button fails to validate authorization

item.title: CVE-2019-3466
item.description: The pg_ctlcluster script in postgresql-common in versions prior to 210 didn't drop privileges when creating socket/statistics temporary directories, which could result in local privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2012-2237
item.description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Mahara 1.4.x before 1.4.3 and 1.5.x before 1.5.2 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via vectors related to (1) javascript innerHTML as used when generating login forms,…

item.title: CVE-2013-1429
item.description: Lintian before 2.5.12 allows remote attackers to gather information about the "host" system using crafted symlinks.

item.title: CVE-2013-1426
item.description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) in Mahara before 1.5.9 and 1.6.x before 1.6.4 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the TinyMCE editor.

item.title: CVE-2013-1425
item.description: ldap-git-backup before 1.0.4 exposes password hashes due to incorrect directory permissions.

item.title: CVE-2019-3465
item.description: Rob Richards XmlSecLibs, all versions prior to v3.0.3, as used for example by SimpleSAMLphp, performed incorrect validation of cryptographic signatures in XML messages, allowing an authenticated attacker to impersonate others or elevate privileges by…

item.title: CVE-2006-4245
item.description: archivemail 0.6.2 uses temporary files insecurely leading to a possible race condition.

item.title: CVE-2006-4243
item.description: linux vserver 2.6 before 2.6.17 suffers from privilege escalation in remount code.

item.title: CVE-2005-2354
item.description: Nvu 0.99+1.0pre uses an old copy of Mozilla XPCOM which can result in multiple security issues.

item.title: CVE-2015-8980
item.description: The plural form formula in ngettext family of calls in php-gettext before 1.0.12 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.
